title: genista cephalantha subsp. cephalantha
intro: Genista cephalantha subsp. cephalantha, also known as the yellow flowered genista, is a species of legume in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Genista cephalantha subsp. cephalantha include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve heart health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and digestive problems.
